home.tagline: A Concise Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine
home.hero_desc: Even from a single piece of text, {brand} can extract the real-world seeds and automatically generate a parallel world with up to {agentCount} agents. Inject variables from a god-view perspective, and find the "local optimum" in complex group interactions under dynamic conditions.
home.hero_slogan: Let the future rehearse among agents; let decisions triumph after a hundred battles
home.status_desc: Prediction engine standing by. Upload multiple unstructured documents to initialize the simulation sequence.
home.step_01_desc: Real-world seed extraction & individual/group memory injection & GraphRAG construction
home.step_02_desc: Entity-relationship extraction & persona generation & environment config agent parameter injection
home.step_03_desc: Dual-platform parallel simulation & automatic prediction demand parsing & dynamic temporal memory update
home.step_04_desc: ReportAgent uses a rich tool suite to interact deeply with the post-simulation environment
home.step_05_desc: Converse with any individual in the simulated world & talk to the ReportAgent
home.drag_upload: Drag and drop files to upload
home.click_browse: or click to browse the file system
home.prompt_placeholder: // Enter simulation or prediction requirements in natural language (e.g., What public opinion trends would occur if a university announced revoking a student's punishment?)

process.auto_build_hint: Graph building will start automatically after generation
process.phase_01_desc: After uploading documents, the LLM analyzes the content and automatically generates an ontology structure suitable for opinion simulation (entity types + relation types)
process.phase_02_desc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are chunked and sent to the Zep API to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relationships
process.no_pending_files: No pending files found. Please return to the home page and try again.

step1.ontology_desc: LLM analyzes document content and simulation requirements, extracts real-world seeds, and automatically generates a suitable ontology structure
step1.graphrag_desc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are automatically chunked and sent to Zep to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relationships, forming temporal memory and community summaries
step1.build_complete_desc: Graph building is complete. Proceed to the next step for environment setup.

step2.sim_instance_desc: Create a new simulation instance and fetch simulation world parameter templates
step2.gen_personas_desc: Combines context to automatically extract entities and relationships from the knowledge graph, initializes simulation individuals, and gives them unique behaviors and memories based on real-world seeds
step2.gen_platform_desc: LLM intelligently sets world time flow rate, recommendation algorithms, activity periods, post frequency, event triggers, and other parameters based on simulation requirements and real-world seeds
step2.activation_desc: Based on narrative direction, automatically generates initial activation events and hot topics to guide the initial state of the simulated world
step2.prep_complete_desc: Simulation environment is ready. You can now start running the simulation.
step2.rounds_config_desc: MiroFish automatically plans to simulate {hours} real-world hours, with each round representing {minutes} minutes of elapsed real time
step2.first_run_tip: For a first run, we strongly recommend switching to 'Custom Mode' to reduce rounds for a quick preview and lower error risk
step2.modal_dim_event_desc: Complete behavioral trajectory in this event

step3.sim_completed: Simulation completed! You can now generate a report.

step5.chat_with_agent: Chat with any individual in the world
step5.report_agent_desc: Fast conversational version of the report-generating agent. Has access to 4 professional tools and full MiroFish memory.
step5.tool_insight_desc: Aligns real-world seed data with simulation environment state, combining Global/Local Memory mechanisms for cross-spatiotemporal deep attribution analysis
step5.tool_panorama_desc: Breadth-first graph traversal algorithm that reconstructs event propagation paths and captures the full topology of information flow
step5.tool_quick_desc: Instant query interface based on GraphRAG, optimized for index efficiency, for quick extraction of specific node attributes and discrete facts
step5.tool_interview_desc: Autonomous interview that conducts multi-turn parallel conversations with individuals in the simulated world, collecting unstructured opinion data and psychological states
step5.empty_report_chat: Chat with Report Agent to dive deeper into the report contents
step5.empty_agent_chat: Chat with a simulated individual to understand their perspectives
step5.survey_input_placeholder: Enter the question you want to ask all selected targets...

graph_panel.title: Graph Relationship Visualization
graph_panel.graphrag_memory_updating: GraphRAG long/short-term memory updating in real time
graph_panel.remaining_processing_hint: Some content is still processing. We recommend refreshing the graph shortly.
graph_panel.waiting_build: Waiting for graph build to complete
